# link11waap_global_filter (Data Source)

Fetches a single global filter by name from a configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Example: Global Filter Data Source (fetch single filter by name)

data "link11waap_config" "main" {}

data "link11waap_global_filter" "filter_by_name" {
  config_id = data.link11waap_config.main.id
  name      = "API Discovery"
}

output "filter_id" {
  value = data.link11waap_global_filter.filter_by_name.id
}

output "filter_active" {
  value = data.link11waap_global_filter.filter_by_name.active
}

output "filter_api_discovery" {
  value = data.link11waap_global_filter.filter_by_name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `config_id` (String) Configuration ID.
- `name` (String) The name of the global filter to look up.

### Read-Only

- `action` (String) Action taken when the filter matches.
- `active` (Boolean) Whether the filter is active.
- `description` (String) Description of the global filter.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the global filter.
- `mdate` (String) Last modification date.
- `rule` (String) JSON-encoded rule definition.
- `source` (String) Source of the global filter.
- `tags` (List of String) Tags associated with the filter.
